name: Granary
note: Food cellar. Pairs with Hunter, Forager. (Starter — no tech.)

name: Trading Post
note: Roadside stall. Pairs with Caravan Guard. (Starter — no tech.)

name: Cellar
note: Cool root storage. Pairs with Smuggler (hides one unit). (Starter — no tech.)

name: Hunter's Lodge
note: Requires Foraging. Hunter and Tracker tile.

name: Watchtower
note: Requires Town Watch. Optimal Watchman / Sentry tile.

name: Mill
note: Requires Mill + Farming. Pairs with Miller (regen aura).

name: Tavern
note: Requires Beer Brewing. Pairs with Brawler (cheap, gains hp here).

name: Apothecary
note: Requires Chemistry. Pairs with Witch Doctor / Battle Medic.

name: Library
note: Requires Reading. Pairs with Scholar (sci aura).

name: Smithy
note: Requires Smithing. Pairs with Cutter, Sapper.

name: Stables
note: Requires Horseback Riding. Cavalry +1 range here.

name: Pottery
note: Requires Ceramics. Pairs with Potter (resource gen).

name: Walls
note: Requires Walls. Pikemen + Halberdiers gain firstStrike here.

name: Forge
note: Requires Smithing + Mining. Sapper / Berserker get +strength here.

name: Quarry Camp
note: Requires Mining. Pairs with Pioneer (production aura).

name: Drill Yard
note: Requires Tactics. Standard Bearer + Recruit Sergeant +strength here.

name: Market
note: Requires Markets. Caravan Guard +range here.

name: Mint
note: Requires Currency. Pairs with Treasurer (chief stipend +1).

name: Workshop
note: Requires Apprenticeship. Trebuchet / Onager +range here.

name: Tower
note: Requires Walls + Masonry. Watchman / Archer / Marksman +1-2 range here.

name: Armory
note: Requires Armor. All non-cavalry units +1 hp here.

name: Garrison
note: Requires Logistics. Soldiers regen +1 here.

name: Fortress
note: Requires Walls + Plate Armor. Army gets full first-strike here.

name: Citadel
note: Requires Walls + Engineering. Strong all-around fort. Combat Engineer here grants +1 hp to adjacent buildings.

name: Cathedral
note: Requires Religion + Masonry. Paladin regen +2 here.

name: School
note: Requires Pedagogy + Library. Scholar / Witch Doctor +sci aura here.

name: Counting House
note: Requires Banking. Trader on this tile yields gold per round.

name: Aqueduct
note: Requires Plumbing + Bridges. Adjacent buildings regen +1 each round.

name: Ironworks
note: Requires Smelting + Smithing. Sapper / Saboteur +2 strength here.

name: Palace
note: Requires Leadership + Architecture. Royal Guard +2 strength here.
